brief: Cedarline HR is rolling out new hires across three departments and wants a JSON onboarding-email router. Each new hire should be routed to the correct department track and receive a sequenced welcome email plus a checklist of first-week tasks. Budget is $500.
reference: A strong deliverable is a JSON workflow that routes each new hire to one of the three department tracks, defines a sequenced welcome email, includes a first-week task checklist, and specifies a fallback rule for unmatched hires. It must not claim to do payroll setup, background checks, or email server hosting.
